prompt: Create a cute 3D portrait in a Cute Stylized 3D Semi-Realistic style. Rely completely on the attached reference image for the facial features, clothing, and identity. Do not change anything in the face, hair, or outfit. Main character: Standing full body exactly in the center of the image. Arms crossed with hands inside the pockets. Head slightly raised and looking upward directly at the camera with a natural smile. Camera angle is directly from above – Top-Down Bird’s-eye View, vertically aligned over the head. Both feet fully visible with no cropping. Around the character, distribute 5-6 Mini Chibi versions of the same character in different poses: peace sign, sitting on a cloud, holding a cup, hugging a cat, sitting comfortably, smiling with hands under the face. Background should be clean white. Fill the empty spaces with hand-drawn doodles: stars, clouds, hearts, cats, smiley faces, sparkles. Write inside the background in a handwritten style with different sizes: "Have a nice day!", "by mokaAi", "WOW", "COOL", "EEYYY", "You’re amazing!", "LET’S GO!", "Good vibes", "meow" Soft daylight lighting, high detail, professional quality. Aspect ratio: 9:16
